title: euphorbia schultzii var. schultzii
intro: Euphorbia schultzii var. schultzii, also known as the Pencil Tree or Stick Onions, is a succulent plant native to South Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Euphorbia schultzii var. schultzii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its latex is also used to treat various conditions, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
